citations.quote_or_note: Synthetic read-only queue item derived from approved manual observation fixture.
citations.source_label: DevHub manual observation reviewer queue fixture

redaction_checks: Only stable surface identifiers and synthetic labels may be proposed.
Private account values, browser artifacts, and raw authenticated values must be absent.
release_gate_reasons: Fixture-only update proposal requires reviewer approval before any active registry work.
rollback_notes: Discard the synthetic fixture proposal and keep the current surface-map fixture unchanged.
stop_before_action_gates: Stop before credential prompts or private account values.
Stop before upload, submit, payment, scheduling, cancellation, or certification controls.
manual_observation_reviewer_queue.title: DevHub home read-only observation
validation_message_expectations: Signed-in status labels remain redacted synthetic labels only.
No validation message may include private permit, account, or payment data.

dispositions.rationale: Approved for a synthetic fixture update proposal only; active surface-map mutation remains out of scope.
dispositions.rollback_note: Remove this proposed fixture update and retain the previously committed synthetic surface-map fixture.
